to.shell_command: /opt/homebrew/bin/zsh -l -c 'osascript -e '\''tell application "System Events" to keystroke "v" using {command down, shift down}'\'''
/opt/homebrew/bin/zsh -l -c 'osascript -e '\''tell application "System Events" to keystroke "v" using {command down, shift down}'\''' &
